evidence_summary: VN-06 flags مِن as a readable but uncertified function token that leaked through a verb-entry candidate family.
VN-06 flags مَن as part of the مِن/مَن/مَنَّ collision family and keeps it exact-address gated.
VN-06 treats the manna row as component-only lexical-noun evidence, not whole-token propagation.
VN-06 flags ثَمَرَةٍ as a lexical noun reviewed through a verb-entry candidate family.
VN-06 flags ثَمَرِهِ as possessed noun evidence that cannot create whole-token certification.
VN-06 flags مَّرَضٌ as a state noun whose context must not be flattened into a broad entry gloss.
VN-06 flags ٱشْتَرَوُا as a finite verb that inherited an omnibus slash gloss.
VN-06 flags حَوْلَهُ as suffix-bearing adverbial/nominal host with hidden pronoun contribution.
VN-06 flags بَيْنَ as a function/adverb relation row in a verb candidate tranche.
VN-06 marks غَضَبٍ as token-only override metadata backfill for a masdar/noun row.
VN-06 marks تَلْبِسُوا as a finite verb where current prose hides person/mood context.
VN-06 marks ٱسْتَسْقَىٰ as finite Form X metadata backfill rather than dictionary prose.
VN-06 flags ٱلْمَغْضُوبِ as component-only passive/nominal evidence, not whole-token certification.
